name: Craftsman Workshop
bestFor: Turning qualified insight into possible strategic moves

steps.label: IDEATE
steps.caption: Generate viable strategic options from the brief.

steps.label: DESIGN
steps.caption: Shape the option into an executable concept.

steps.label: PROTOTYPE
steps.caption: Represent the concept as a lightweight artifact.

steps.label: REFINE
steps.caption: Improve the artifact before decision review.

capabilities.label: Stardance
capabilities.description: Future creative orchestration for shaping experience and narrative artifacts.

capabilities.label: QDS
capabilities.description: Future qualification layer for testing assumptions and decision readiness.

integrationSlots.label: Stardance Artifact System
integrationSlots.description: Narrative and experience artifact generation will integrate here.

integrationSlots.label: QDS Assumption Test
